Drone Strike Destroys HIMARS Launcher at Kuwait-Iraq Border

— S3 · Conflict · Kuwait-Iraq Border · 3m ago. A drone strike destroyed a HIMARS launcher near the Kuwait-Iraq border, with a fire detected by NASA FIRMS. The strike is part of the ongoing Iran-US conflict.
